subject: [PATCH v7 15/15] Documentation/userfaultfd: document RWP working set tracking

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch adds documentation to the Linux kernel's userfaultfd feature, specifically covering read-write protection (RWP) working set tracking. It explains how RWP works, including its fault models and semantics, as well as how it interacts with other features like UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC. The documentation also describes a typical workflow for VMM working-set-tracking using RWP.
